project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
epic: EPIC 16: Public Safety And Community Resilience
notes: Added services/school-service Go API with school profiles, drill records, and readiness checks; district-scoped access for district officers and full access for system admins. Authority-dashboard SchoolPreparednessPanel with school list, district filter, profile detail, drill form, readiness checklist form, and Leaflet map with readiness indicators. Shared TypeScript contracts, smoke script, CI Docker matrix entry, README, api.md docs, and dashboard record added. Student population data is authority-scoped only.
